testcase.name: testRegression_InicioSimulacion
testcase.system-out:
15:15:17.922 [main] INFO c.s.i.service.LogServiceImpl - === INICIANDO SIMULACION === 15:15:17.922 [main] INFO c.s.i.service.LogServiceImpl - Horario: 08:00 - 9:00 (1 horas) 15:15:17.922 [main] INFO c.s.i.service.LogServiceImpl - testcase.name: testRegression_SimulacionCompleta
